prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第55名，排名稳定；声誉平稳，抖音关注度一般，未见明显投档异常；基础医学B+、临床医学B+、药学B+等，医学类学科整体较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业社会热度持续较高；本省2026年考生数预计小幅增加，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招及考生增加，在2025年基准14200名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约15197 名，区间14697-15697名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限可重点冲临床医学（5+3一体化）等王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 13000 → 12500 → 13200 → 13800 → 14200, showing a general backward shift in recent years, with a 2025 baseline of about 14200; the provincial plan for 2025 is 18 students, and for 2026 it is 20 students, a slight expansion of about 11%, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 55th, stable ranking; stable reputation, average Douyin attention, no obvious abnormal admissions; Basic Medicine B+, Clinical Medicine B+, Pharmacy B+, etc., overall strong medical disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to have high social popularity; the number of examinees in the province is expected to increase slightly in 2026, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of backward shift in historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan, and the increase in examinees, based on the 2025 baseline of 14200, the ranking is expected to continue shifting backward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15197, with a range of 14697-15697.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Stomatology
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Nursing
- Pharmacy
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range, you can prioritize applying to top programs like Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program).
